items.name: set_active_view
items.doc: Switch the active view by name — updates cache and UI.

items.name: get_active_view
items.doc: Get the currently active view name from the adapter cache.

items.name: set_dark_mode
items.doc: Set dark mode on/off — updates cache and UI Theme global.

items.name: get_dark_mode
items.doc: Check if dark mode is currently active (reads from cache).

items.name: set_status
items.doc: Set the status bar text — updates cache and UI.

items.name: get_status
items.doc: Get the current status bar text from the adapter cache.

items.name: get_zoom
items.doc: Get the current UI zoom scale from the adapter cache.

items.name: get_row_top_ratio
items.doc: Get the top row ratio from the adapter cache.

items.name: get_row_main_ratio
items.doc: Get the main row ratio from the adapter cache.

items.name: set_platform
items.doc:
Set the active platform — updates cache and Theme.platform token router.
Call once at startup before `run()` (or when switching platforms).

items.name: get_platform
items.doc: Get the current platform from the adapter cache.
